prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次为约11196→6629→13135→11848→11160名，波动剧烈；2022年出现异常低位（6629），2023年大幅后移至13135，2024–2025 年稳定在约11160–11848区间，近两年趋于平稳；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年39人，2024年40人，2025年54人，2026年增至59人， 较2025年扩招约9.26%，连续两年扩招，对竞争压力有一定缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第103 名→2025年第61名→2026年第63名，整体处于全国前70强，层次稳步提升；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要因2025年该校在河北、河南等省份录取位次下滑超500 名，中医学专业在部分省份出现断档信号；抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量偏低，未形成明显报考热度助推；第五轮学。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中医学、临床医学等医学大类专业社会热度持续偏热，2024年临床医学评估为推荐 ，口腔医学评估为推荐，护理学评估为推荐，医学类专业整体报考意愿较强；云南省2026年普通高考总人数约37.79万人，较2025年 （约28.57万人）增长约32.3%，按物理类占比约60.65%估算，2026年物理类考生约22.92万人，竞争明显加剧；2026年；该校位于 北京市，非云南省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；历年云南招生人数占比较小（约1%–3%），地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次基准（11160）、2026年物理类扩 招约9.26%的缓解效应、声誉偏负面信号以及本省物理类考生大幅增加约32.3%的竞争加剧因素，考生增量效应强于扩招效应，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年小幅前移（更难 进）；预测最低位次约11700名，区间11200–12200名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 11196 → 6629 → 13135 → 11848 → 11160, with significant fluctuations; an abnormally low ranking occurred in 2022 (6629), a sharp drop to 13135 in 2023, and stabilization around 11160–11848 in 2024–2025, showing recent stability; enrollment plans for Science/Physics Category in Yunnan Province: 39 students from 2021 to 2023, 40 in 2024, 54 in 2025, and increasing to 59 in 2026, an expansion of about 9.26% compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion, somewhat alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years, from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, overall within the top 70 nationally, with a steadily improving level; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to a drop of over 500 places in admission rankings in provinces such as Hebei and Henan in 2025, with signs of gaps in Traditional Chinese Medicine programs in some provinces; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with low short video exposure, not forming a significant boost in application popularity; fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs such as Traditional Chinese Medicine and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity, with Clinical Medicine rated as recommended in 2024, Stomatology as recommended, Nursing as recommended, and overall strong willingness to apply for medical programs; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 229,200 based on a proportion of about 60.65%, indicating significantly intensified competition; 2026; the university is located in Beijing, not a local university in Yunnan Province, with no local admission preference; the proportion of Yunnan admissions over the years is small (about 1%–3%), with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking baseline (11160), the mitigation effect of a Physics Category expansion of about 9.26% in 2026, the negative reputation signal, and the intensified competition from a significant increase of about 32.3% in local Physics Category candidates, the candidate increase effect outweighs the expansion effect, so the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (harder to enter); predicted minimum ranking is about 11700, with a range of 11200–12200.

- Traditional Chinese Medicine (Wang Qi Class) (Liangxiang Campus).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Physics Category offers a wide range of programs (17). For rankings within the predicted range of 11200–12200, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<11200), prioritize flagship programs such as Traditional Chinese Medicine bachelor's-master's-doctoral continuous programs; for rankings near the upper limit (>12200), mainly choose Tier 3 safety programs.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 780 → 1650 → 1551 → 1944 → 1199, showing significant fluctuations; in 2025, the ranking moved forward by about 745 places compared to 2024, returning to a relatively high level in recent years, but stability is insufficient; the enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Yunnan Province: 5 students in 2021, 4 students each year from 2022 to 2025, increasing to 5 students in 2026, an expansion of 25% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising steadily in recent years, from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 to 63rd in 2026, overall within the top 70 nationally, with a steadily improving level; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to the decline of over 500 places in admission rankings in provinces such as Hebei and Henan in 2025, and the Chinese Medicine major experiencing a cutoff phenomenon in some provinces; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, with an average evaluation, low short video exposure, and no significant boost in application popularity; fifth round.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, not a local university in Yunnan Province, so there is no enrollment preference for the province; the proportion of Yunnan enrollment over the years is relatively small (about 1%–3%), and regional preference has limited impact; medical majors such as Chinese Medicine and Clinical Medicine continue to be socially popular, with Clinical Medicine evaluated as recommended in 2024 and Stomatology evaluated as recommended, indicating strong overall willingness to apply for medical majors; the total number of general college entrance examination students in Yunnan Province in 2026 is about 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (about 285,700), and estimating the history category proportion at about 39.35%, the number of history category examinees in 2026 is about 148,700, significantly intensifying competition; 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure after the significant forward movement in 2025 rankings, the mitigating effect of a 25% expansion in the history category in 2026, the slightly negative reputation signals, and the intensified competition due to a roughly 32.3% increase in the number of history category examinees in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1399, with a range of 1147–1651.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are few majors in the history category (only 4). For rankings within the predicted range of 1147–1651, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1147), focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Acupuncture and Tuina.
